mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, user_id, source_id, title, chunk_index, total_chunks, chunk_text, create_time FROM chunk WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chunk (article_id, user_id, source_id, title, chunk_index, total_chunks, chunk_text, create_time) VALUES
(#{chunk.articleId}, #{chunk.userId}, #{chunk.sourceId}, #{chunk.title}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.totalChunks}, #{chunk.chunkText}, #{chunk.createTime})
